title: Darker Ice
description: A lightweight pack that makes ice easier on the eyes for boat racing.
body:
![An ice boat track with Darker Ice enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PEVwu9jn/images/91e266a38410af8b8100149842c24caad8b905bf.png)
Changes the textures of Ice, Packed Ice, and Blue Ice to look darker and easier on the eyes. Also makes racing surfaces look more like asphalt. Intended for ice boat racing.
